title: BIC 4-Colour Sun Pen Multi Retractable Yellow Barrel Design Multicolour Pen with Four Assorted Vibrant Inks for School & Office & Colour Coding
features: BIC 4 COLOUR SUN PEN - Our BIC 4 colour pen brings a vibrant touch to your writing with a unique selection of four bold ink colours such as pink, purple, orange, and yellow. This multi-coloured pen all in one adds creativity to note-taking, journaling, and organising. The bright yellow handle and sleek two-tone design give the multicoloured pen a fun and stylish appearance.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - Our BIC 4-colour pen ball pen is made with durable plastic to withstand daily use. The multi-pen 4-in-one features a medium 1.0mm tip, ensuring smooth ink flow for precise writing. Each 4 in 1 pen is designed for long-lasting performance, making it a reliable choice for students, professionals, and creatives who require high-quality multicoloured pens all in one.

BOLD & VIBRANT COLOURS - Our multi-pen features a selection of bright and eye-catching ink colours, perfect for adding personality to messages, notes, and creative work. The 4 colour pen all-in-one is ideal for journaling, highlighting key details, or creating fun and expressive designs. The unique shade selection makes this multi-colour pen stand out from traditional options.

COMPACT & PORTABLE - Our BIC multi-pen 4-in-one is designed with a lightweight and ergonomic body for comfortable use. The built-in side clip ensures that the multicolour pen can be attached securely to notebooks, planners, or pockets for easy access.

PACK SIZES & VARIATIONS - Our 4 colour pen ensures you always have a reliable multi-colour pen for your writing needs. Each BIC 4 colour pens ball pen features a medium tip with a 1.0mm line width, delivering smooth and consistent ink flow.
